summary: Admin panel image upload and notifications feature testing - All backend tests passed (14/14). All frontend tests passed. Admin panel has 3 tabs (Lokacije, Obavještenja, Postavke). Image upload works via expo-image-picker. Notification send form and history working. All existing features continue to work.

design_issues.issue: Close button is outside viewport on mobile (375x667) when modal content is long
design_issues.workaround: User can tap outside modal to close or use back button

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added min_length=1 validation to NotificationCreate model
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test notification sent: 'TEST Obavještenje'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional with 3 tabs. Image upload uses expo-image-picker with FormData. Notifications send to Expo push notification service. All backend APIs require admin authentication. Frontend had stale build issue initially - required expo restart to show all 3 tabs.

push_notifications.test_send_notification_empty_title: ✓ Validates empty title (422 error after fix)
push_notifications.test_send_notification_empty_body: ✓ Validates empty body (422 error after fix)

frontend_tests.admin_login: ✓ Admin login works with credentials from test_credentials.md
frontend_tests.tabs_visible: ✓ All 3 tabs visible (Lokacije, Obavještenja, Postavke) with testID attributes

lokacije_tab.edit_modal: ✓ Edit modal opens when clicking edit button
lokacije_tab.image_upload_button: ✓ Image upload button visible in edit modal (testID='upload-image-btn')
lokacije_tab.location_thumbnails: ✓ Locations with images show thumbnail in list

obavještenja_tab.send_notification: ✓ Sending notification works (form filled, button clicked)
obavještenja_tab.history_update: ✓ History updates after send (16 items after send)
obavještenja_tab.active_devices_display: ✓ Shows active device count (4 aktivnih uređaja)

frontend_tests.tab_switching: ✓ Switching between tabs works correctly (locations still visible after switching back)

integration_tests.backend_frontend_integration: ✓ Frontend sends notifications to backend via POST /api/admin/notifications/send

integration_tests.image_upload_integration: ✓ Frontend uploads images via FormData to POST /api/admin/locations/{id}/images
integration_tests.image_storage: ✓ Images stored as base64 data URIs in location.images array

backend_endpoints.POST_api_admin_locations_id_images: ✓ Working - Accepts file upload, returns data URI, requires admin auth
backend_endpoints.DELETE_api_admin_locations_id_images_ind: ✓ Working - Deletes image by index, requires admin auth
backend_endpoints.POST_api_admin_notifications_send: ✓ Working - Sends push notification, validates title/body, requires admin auth
backend_endpoints.GET_api_admin_notifications: ✓ Working - Returns notification history, requires admin auth
backend_endpoints.GET_api_admin_push_stats: ✓ Working - Returns active device count, requires admin auth

admin_panel_ui.tab_switching: ✓ Working - Clicking tabs switches view, activeTab state updates

lokacije_tab.location_list: ✓ Working - Shows all locations with thumbnails if images exist
lokacije_tab.edit_button: ✓ Working - Opens edit modal for location
lokacije_tab.add_button: ✓ Working - Opens modal for new location
lokacije_tab.edit_modal: ✓ Working - Shows location details, category selector, inputs

notification_send_endpoint.expo_push_api: ✓ Sends to Expo push service in chunks of 100

notification_send_endpoint.response: ✓ Returns notification record with id, title, body, stats, created_at

notification_history_endpoint.database_query: ✓ Fetches from notifications collection, sorted by created_at desc
notification_history_endpoint.response: ✓ Returns array of notification records, excludes _id

push_stats_endpoint.database_query: ✓ Counts documents in push_tokens collection where active=true

POST_api_admin_locations_id_images.status: ✓ Working - Uploads image and returns data URI

POST_api_admin_notifications_send.status: ✓ Working - Sends notification and returns stats

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: Backend NotificationCreate model did not validate empty title/body
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added Field(min_length=1) to title and body fields in NotificationCreate model

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: Frontend showed only 2 tabs initially (Lokacije and Postavke) - Obavještenja tab missing
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Restarted expo service with 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo'
bugs_found_and_fixed.note: This was a build cache issue, not a code issue. After restart, all 3 tabs appeared correctly.

known_issues.issue: Edit location modal close button is outside viewport on mobile when modal content is long
known_issues.workaround: User can tap outside modal to close or use device back button
known_issues.recommendation: Consider adding a sticky close button at top of modal or reducing modal content height
